site.name: Ironlace Studio
site.defaultTitle: Ironlace Studio — Heirloom CNC work from the garage floor
site.defaultDescription: Ironlace Studio is a one-person CNC garage shop cutting walnut, steel, aluminum, and brass into editioned, signed, shop-made objects. Signage, inlays, wall pieces, and custom commissions. Studio-to-door, nationwide.

longtail: walnut and brass inlay wall art
one of one CNC wall piece
CNC signage for storefront small business
heirloom CNC wood and metal art
numbered limited edition metal wall art

pages.title: Ironlace Studio — Heirloom CNC work, cut in the garage
pages.description: Editioned, signed, shop-made objects in walnut, steel, aluminum, and brass. Browse the shop, send a vector for commission, and ship studio-to-door.

pages.title: The Shop — Limited editions in wood, steel, and brass
pages.description: Every piece in the Ironlace shop is cut on the Shapeoko, finished by hand, and numbered. One of one, or one of twelve. Live inventory, honest photography.
keywords: numbered limited edition metal wall art

pages.title: Signage — Blackened steel, brushed aluminum, shop-made
pages.description: Storefront signs, house numbers, and custom business signage cut in steel and aluminum. Hand-finished and editioned. Trade pricing for designers.
keywords: CNC signage for storefront small business

pages.title: Wall Art — Inlaid walnut and machined aluminum pieces
pages.description: One-of-one and one-of-twelve wall pieces in walnut with brass pin inlays, brushed aluminum panels, and blackened steel compositions. Shop-floor photographed.
pages.h1: Wall pieces, numbered on the back.
keywords: walnut and brass inlay wall art
one of one CNC wall piece
heirloom CNC wood and metal art

pages.title: Hardware — Custom CNC hardware for the obsessive remodel
pages.description: Escutcheons, pulls, range hood straps, and closet hardware cut to match your remodel. Order from stock profiles, or commission one-offs from a vector.

pages.title: Commission a piece — Send a vector, get a quote in a day
pages.description: Upload an SVG, DXF, or sketch. Pick a material and finish. Ironlace quotes in a business day, cuts in a week or two, and ships crated and tracked.

pages.title: Shop Journal — What's on the bench this week
pages.description: Process notes, short films of cuts in progress, and the occasional mistake-turned-keeper. Updated weekly from the Ironlace garage.

pages.title: Trade Program — Designers, architects, remodelers
pages.description: Trade pricing and priority commission slots for design and remodel professionals. Request a trade account and source pieces your clients will ask about.
keywords: CNC signage for storefront small business

pages.title: Shipping & Returns — Studio-to-door, crated and tracked
pages.description: How Ironlace crates, ships, and insures every piece. Live shipping rates at checkout. Damage claims handled directly by the shop, no ticket queue.

pages.title: About — One person, one Shapeoko, one garage
pages.description: Ironlace Studio is a single-maker CNC shop. Material honesty, editioned work, and the garage as the gallery. Read the shop's origin and philosophy.
